CreateCfwRule.cfwRules.protocol: Protocol type, valid values: \[ TCP \| UDP \| ICMP \| ALL ]
CreateCfwRule.cfwRules.direction: Traffic direction, valid values: \[ in \| out ]; NAT boundary firewall only supports outbound rules, inbound traffic is allowed by default
CreateCfwRule.cfwRules.sourceAddress: Source IP address or CIDR block, e.g. 180.76.1.0/24 or 180.76.1.1; 0.0.0.0/0 means all
CreateCfwRule.cfwRules.destAddress: Destination IP address or CIDR block, e.g. 180.76.1.0/24 or 180.76.1.1; 0.0.0.0/0 means all
CreateCfwRule.cfwRules.sourcePort: Source port, an integer or range between 0-65535, e.g. 8080 or 8080-8090; 0-65535 means all
CreateCfwRule.cfwRules.destPort: Destination port, an integer or range between 0-65535, e.g. 8080 or 8080-8090; 0-65535 means all
CreateCfwRule.cfwRules.action: Rule action, valid values: \[ allow \| deny \| observe ]
